whatsNew: Rules that survive contact. A 3-domain stress test (mobile health · dark observability · warm e-commerce, zero user direction) confirmed the 1st-gen AI tells are gone — and exposed the 2nd generation: the escape hatches becoming clichés (ghost 01/02/03 on every section, identical overline+number cards). New CC-9c fights it: one signature treatment per project, varied section anatomy. Also fixed the contradictions the test surfaced: dark-mode elevation (tonal ramp + hairlines, not shadows), one 8px grid, radius personality mapping, accent-vs-semantic-green collision rules, locked imagery palettes, desktop app-chrome + dense-data type scales, CJK tracking, and a page-type-aware Quality Gate.
update: Run /ss-update, or: npx skills add bitjaru/styleseed
